app.name: PooramPay
app.tagline: Festival committee collections & expenses — simple and transparent

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.collectBody: Your name, email (from Google sign-in), and phone number; the financial records your committee enters (collections, expenses, coupons); and register details you add (household/member names, contacts, and optional GPS locations you pin).
privacy.useBody: Only to run your committee's collections and accounts inside this app — showing balances, reports, and who collected or approved what. We do not use your data for advertising and we do not sell it.
privacy.locationBody: GPS is used only when you tap 'Pin GPS Location' to save a house/member location for follow-up collection. The app never tracks your location in the background.
privacy.shareBody: Only members of your committee program, according to the role and permissions your committee admin sets. Platform administrators may access data to prevent misuse. Data is stored securely on Supabase (Postgres) with row-level security.
privacy.securityBody: All traffic is encrypted (HTTPS). Access is controlled at the database level. Financial records cannot be permanently deleted — they move to a visible deleted bucket for transparency and audit.
privacy.rightsBody: You can request a copy of your personal data or ask us to delete your account and personal data. Committee financial records may be retained for the committee's audit integrity, but your personal profile can be removed.

errors.frozen: This program is frozen — records are read-only.
errors.notAllowed: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.nothingToHandover: You are not holding any cash right now.
errors.areaNotEmpty: This area still has entries. Deactivate it instead, or move the entries first.
errors.network: Network problem. Check your connection and try again.
errors.generic: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

update.help: Update now to get the latest features and fixes.

install.title: Install PooramPay
install.body: Add it to your home screen for a faster, app-like experience.
install.iosHelp: Tap the Share button, then 'Add to Home Screen'.

access.title: Access Log
access.subtitle: Every sign-in with IP, device and location. Visible only to platform admins.

auth.phoneHelp: Committee members will contact you on this number
auth.noProgram: You are not part of any committee program yet.
auth.noProgramHelp: Ask your committee admin to add you using your Google email address:

admin.label: Full access
admin.hint: Sees everything and can record, edit, delete and manage the committee.

finance.label: Sees all finances
finance.hint: Sees all money and can record & approve, but cannot delete records or manage members.

own.label: Own collections only
own.hint: Sees only what they collected or spent — not the committee totals.

released.label: Released results only
released.hint: Can submit expenses; sees finances only after the committee publishes the results.

members.noCommittee: Select a committee program first to manage its team.
members.scopeNote: People added here can access every program under this committee.

s1.title: Welcome to PooramPay!
s1.body: One app to run your committee's collections, expenses and accounts with full transparency — for temples, churches, mosques, clubs, colleges and associations.
s1.tip: Two minutes is all this tour takes

s2.title: 1 · Create your organization
s2.body: Start by creating your organization — its name, type and place. A guided setup walks you through everything step by step.

s3.title: 2 · Add the committee
s3.body: Under the organization comes the committee — the team that runs everything. For example "Club Management 2026". You are added as President automatically.
s3.tip: One organization can have many committees

s4.title: 3 · Members & privileges
s4.body: Add members with positions. President, Secretary and Treasurer see everything. Others can be limited — see only what they collected, or see accounts only after the committee publishes the results. You decide who sees the money.
s4.tip: Custom positions like "Magazine Editor" can be added too

s5.title: 4 · Start a program
s5.body: A program is one year's activity — like "Onam 2026". Set the year, opening balance and who you collect from (houses, members, shops…). Next year, copy the whole register forward in one tap.
s5.tip: Members added to the committee get access to all its programs

s6.title: 5 · Collect money
s6.body: Record house-to-house collections, coupon books, weekly subscriptions and donations. Every entry gets an automatic receipt number — nothing goes unaccounted.
s6.tip: Areas & register make door-to-door collection easy

s7.title: 6 · Spend with approval
s7.body: Submit expenses with a photo of the bill. The treasurer approves, then it is paid and recorded. Not a rupee moves without approval.

s8.title: 7 · Hand over cash
s8.body: Collectors always see the cash in their hand and hand it over to the treasurer inside the app — both sides confirm, so there is no confusion later.
s8.tip: UPI and bank entries are tracked automatically

s9.title: 8 · Transparent accounts
s9.body: Cash book, budget vs actual and profit & loss — any time. At the end, the committee signs and publishes the final accounts for every member to see. Every change is logged; nothing can be erased.
s9.tip: Finished programs can be frozen — read-only forever

s10.title: You're ready!
s10.body: Create your organization, add your team, and run this year's program with complete transparency. Install PooramPay on your phone for one-tap access.

wizard.introOrg: You're setting up a new organization. Next you'll create a committee (the team that runs it), add its members, and set up its first program (one year's collection).
wizard.introCommittee: A committee is the team that runs the collections for {{org}}. Give it a name — you'll add its members next.
wizard.introMembers: Add people and pick each one's position. The position decides how much of the finances they can see. You've been added as President already.
wizard.introProgram: A program is one year's collections & expenses — for example this year's festival or event.
wizard.doneSummary: {{org}} → {{committee}} is ready with {{members}} member(s) and the program "{{program}}".

profile.title: My Profile
profile.nicknameHint: Other members will see this name.

dashboard.frozen: This program is frozen. All records are read-only.

reports.title: Reports
reports.retainedNote: Retained balance to carry forward to next year's program
reports.pendingBody: The final income & expenditure and remaining balance will appear here once the committee closes and digitally signs the accounts at the end of the programme.
reports.signHint: When the programme is over, the committee approves and digitally signs the final accounts to publish them to all members.
reports.signConfirm: Approve and digitally sign the final accounts? This publishes the final income, expenditure and remaining balance to all members.
reports.signedOk: Signed. Final accounts are now published to all members.

setup.title: Setup
setup.freezeWarning: After freezing, nobody can add or change anything in this program. Only the platform administrator can unfreeze. Are you sure?
setup.deleteWarnOrg: This permanently deletes the organization and ALL its committees, programs and records. This cannot be undone.
setup.deleteWarnCommittee: This permanently deletes the committee and ALL its programs and records. This cannot be undone.
setup.deleteWarnProgram: This permanently deletes the program and ALL its collections, expenses and records. This cannot be undone.
setup.cannotDeleteFrozen: This program is frozen. Only a platform administrator can delete it.
setup.appliesAllPrograms: This person will have access to every program under this committee.
setup.personHint: Any member of the household — not necessarily the head
setup.quickAddHelp: Type a name and press Enter — it saves and moves to the next one.
setup.bulkPasteHelp: One per line: Name, Person, Phone, Email (only the name is required)
setup.gpsHelp: Tap while standing at the {{unit}} to save its exact location for easy follow-up.
setup.gpsEachEntry: Pin my location with each entry (door-to-door)
setup.gpsError: Could not get location. Allow location access in your browser and try again.
setup.areaNotEmpty: This area has entries. Deactivate it instead of deleting, or move the entries first.
setup.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate this area? It will be hidden when collecting, but its history stays.
setup.budgetHelp: Enter the planned amount for each head. Compare with actuals on the dashboard.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.deleteWarning: This will move the record to the Deleted Transactions bucket. It stays visible for transparency. Reason is mandatory.

admin.title: Admin Console
admin.deleteOrgWarning: This permanently deletes the organization and ALL its committees, programs, collections, expenses and records. This cannot be undone.
admin.deleteOrgConfirm: Type the organization name to confirm: {{name}}
